winner: Tweet where you don't trade? More like *don't tweet where you don’t trade*—unless you enjoy losing money and making people laugh at your expense.

candidates.text: Why did the trader break up with Twitter? Because it left him feeling *tweet*-less about his investments!

candidates.text: I told my broker I’d only trade if he swore on his tweets that he wouldn’t front-run me—he said that wasn’t part of his terms and conditions.
